description: This masterclass covers P2P trading on Binance, explaining its definition, functionality, and safety features. Brenton Nakia leads the session, providing insights into how users can buy and sell cryptocurrencies directly between each other using Binance's platform. The session includes a Q&A segment for participants to engage directly.
topic_summary: Introduction to Binance P2P trading, its mechanics, and safety measures. Discussion on how to initiate trades and the benefits of using Binance for peer-to-peer transactions.
